tasks.description: Select Final Portfolio and optimize risk/position sizing; validate constraints

subtasks.description: Choose final tickers and pre-allocations meeting count constraints and thesis
Call build_portfolio with final portfolio_dict to optimize and size
Call exposure_calculator to verify net ~+0.30 and gross ≤2.00
Call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to ensure low market beta
Call correlation_matrix to confirm low pairwise corr; resolve pairs >0.5
Call VaR_calculator and industry_concentration for risk/diversification checks
Call factor_tilts_for_portfolio and calculate_portfolio_past_performance for style and risk-adjusted validation
If any constraint violated, iterate weights/tickers and re-run 6b–6g

tasks.description: Track execution, evidence, and completion status

subtasks.description: Call add_task_evidence to attach key analytics outputs and decisions
Call update_task_status as milestones complete
Call get_task_progress_summary and get_execution_summary for oversight
Call get_plan_health_status and check_plan_completion_status before finalizing
If blocked, call handle_task_failure with recovery plan
